# Money Sense Lending

> Money Sense Lending is a mortgage broking firm at 64 Church Street, Traralgon VIC 3844, Australia, serving the Latrobe Valley and greater Gippsland. Rated 5.0 stars from 135+ Google reviews (see live count on the site). Owner and lead broker Dougal Williams was ranked the #1 mortgage broker in Victoria on RateMyAgent (most verified client reviews over the past 12 months, July 2026).

Key facts:
- Trading name: Money Sense Lending (legal entity: Money Sense Finance Pty Ltd, ABN 68 687 032 373)
- Credit Representative #569124 under Australian Credit Licence #232706; MFAA member; AFCA member
- Compares home loan options from 30+ lenders via the AFG aggregator; the service is free to clients (the lender pays at settlement)
- Specialties: first home buyers (including government schemes such as the First Home Guarantee — eligibility applies), refinancing, investment lending and loan structuring, business and commercial finance
- Owner/lead broker: Dougal Williams — QPIA (Qualified Property Investment Adviser, via PIPA), a former plumber who bought his first property at 21; first-year settlements of 81 loans worth $34 million; half the active client book is under 30
- Phone: 1300 442 497 · Web: https://mslending.au

## Key pages
- [Home](https://mslending.au/): overview, services, live review count
- [First Home Buyers](https://mslending.au/first-home-buyers/): schemes, deposits, guidance for first-time buyers
- [Refinancing](https://mslending.au/refinancing/): rate reviews and switching analysis
- [Ranked #1 in Victoria — RateMyAgent, July 2026](https://mslending.au/number-1-mortgage-broker-victoria/): the announcement with verification
- [Dougal Williams](https://mslending.au/our-team/dougal-williams/): owner and lead broker profile
- [Mortgage Broker Gippsland](https://mslending.au/mortgage-broker-gippsland/): region hub covering Traralgon, Morwell, Moe, Sale, Warragul and surrounds
- [Book an appointment](https://mslending.au/book-appointment/): free first chat

- [Home Loans](https://mslending.au/home-loans/): purchase, upgrade and construction lending
- [Investment Loans](https://mslending.au/investment-loans/): investor lending and structuring
- [About](https://mslending.au/about-us/): the firm and how it works
- [Loan Health Check](https://mslending.au/loan-health-check/): free tool — is your current rate still competitive?

## Service areas
Traralgon, Morwell, Moe, Churchill, Trafalgar, Sale, Maffra, Warragul, Drouin, Bairnsdale, Leongatha, Wonthaggi, Inverloch, Korumburra, Lakes Entrance, Paynesville, Cowes, and the wider Latrobe Valley and Gippsland region of Victoria, Australia.
